name: Paprika Pork with Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, halved, seeded, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large frying pan over medium heat.
2. Fry chops for 3-4 minutes until browned on both sides.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add garlic, vegetable stock, white wine, and paprika to the pan.
5. Cover and cook for 20 minutes.
6. Turn chops once during cooking.
7. Add sliced red bell peppers and stir in creme fraiche.
8. Simmer over low heat for an additional 10 minutes until the pork is cooked through.
